description: Volume resize: volume_id-required and size-below-10GB rejections both languages agree on (confirm set so both reach them), plus the resize POST. Confirm-gate text and the missing-size message diverge (see report).

cases.name: rejects size below 10 GB
cases.expect_error: volume size must be at least 10 GB

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation may increase billing. Volumes cannot be downsized. Set confirm=true to proceed.
